title: Test Layers, Service Containers, Coverage, and Changed-Case Evidence · Pipeline Repair Bay
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective layered test and service evidence plan; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in test layers, service containers, coverage, and changed-case evidence, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered test and service evidence plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
Configure service image identity, ports, health, credentials, network scope, per-job state, migrations, fixtures, and deterministic teardown.
Shard tests without duplicate or missing cases and detect order, time, locale, seed, port, and shared-state dependence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy-1k8oax". Tailor its test-evidence.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy, keep Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy-1k8oax
  - competency: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy
    artifact: test-evidence.yaml
    decision: test report quarantine policy
    environment: protected main branch under a merge queue
    fault-injection: route five percent traffic to a revision with a data incompatibility
    retained-proof: lock hash cold install test report package contents and output digest
    case-key: 1k8oax
    change: |
      layers: [unit, component, integration, contract, e2e, accessibility, security]
      service-image: postgres@sha256:verified
      service-health: readiness-query
      state: per-job-fixture
      shard-proof: complete-and-disjoint
      coverage: branch-changed-line-and-mutation
      retry: disabled-by-default
      reports: immutable-junit-trace-screenshot
    verify: run changed-case tests with fresh service state deterministic seeds report reconciliation and failure preservation
    failure: Reject coverage percentage as assertion quality, start as readiness, shared mutable fixtures, or retry-until-green.
    repair: Select layers by risk, wait for service behavior, isolate state, prove shards, preserve reports, and repair flakes causally.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.text: The Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy structural check is only one gate. layered test and service evidence plan must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
